carphedon.dose_note: Rapid onset. Typically taken up to three times a day.
carphedon.name: carphedon

properties.dose: Oral Common: 100-200mg | NOTE: Typically taken up to three times a day.
properties.summary: A nootropic and piracetam analogue also known as fonturacetam. This drug has been shown to have potential memory enhancing, anxiolytic, anti-amnesia and anti-depressive effects. However the drug has reportedly little recreational value. Around 45x more potent than Piracetam.
